title: Singapore MRT SBS Transit North East Line C751A and C751C
description: This is a retexture of the Minecraft Transit Railway mod's default A-Train as the Singapore MRT C751A and C751C, operated by SBS Transit on the North East Line.
body:
This pack requires **Minecraft Transit Railway**.

Contents:

- SBS Transit C751A (regular and mini variants)
- SBS Transit C751C (regular and mini variants)
